merged_events.event_description: The U.S. Embassy at Mbabane was established upon Swaziland's attainment of independence, with Chris C. Pappas, Jr., as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on September 6, 1968, when the American Embassy at Mbabane was established with Chris C. Pappas, Jr., as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Exact match on date (1968-09-06) and status (Embassy). Both describe the establishment of the U.S. Embassy at Mbabane upon Swaziland's independence.
